title: Doc2ArchAgent Document Inventory Schema
description: Schema for patterns/**/contexts/sources/doc-inventory.yaml — inventory of source documents collected for a pattern.

pattern_ref.description: Pattern ID this inventory belongs to.

pattern_type.description: Whether this is a product or network pattern.

documents.description: List of source documents collected for this pattern.

file.description: Filename of the document in sources/.

format.description: File format (pdf, docx, md, txt, image).

conversion_method.description: How the document was converted (e.g., pymupdf, python-docx, manual, ocr).

topics.description: Architecture topics detected in this document.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source document.

split_from.description: If this document was split from a mixed-content original, the original filename.

section_range.description: Pages or sections from the original (e.g., '16-28').
